'''shakuchu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wynd|wynd]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-k-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wynd|wynd]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| shakuchu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shækichith|shækichith]] || [[word:shækichij|shækichij]] || [[word:shækichish|shækichish]] || [[word:shækichi|shækichi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shakukuchuth|shakukuchuth]] || [[word:shakukuchuj|shakukuchuj]] || [[word:shakukuchush|shakukuchush]] || [[word:shakukuchu|shakukuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shakuchuth|shakuchuth]] || [[word:shakuchuj|shakuchuj]] || [[word:shakuchush|shakuchush]] || [[word:shakuchu|shakuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shakufchuth|shakufchuth]] || [[word:shakufchuj|shakufchuj]] || [[word:shakufchush|shakufchush]] || [[word:shakufchuf|shakufchuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shakuchuthu|shakuchuthu]] || [[word:shakuchuju|shakuchuju]] || [[word:shakuchushu|shakuchushu]] || [[word:shakuchuku|shakuchuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shakuchuth|shakuchuth]] || [[word:shakuchuj|shakuchuj]] || [[word:shakuchush|shakuchush]] || [[word:shakuchu|shakuchu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shakuchuthul|shakuchuthul]] || [[word:shakuchujul|shakuchujul]] || [[word:shakuchushul|shakuchushul]] || [[word:shakuchukul|shakuchukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shakuchuthuthu|shakuchuthuthu]] || [[word:shakuchujuju|shakuchujuju]] || [[word:shakuchushushu|shakuchushushu]] || [[word:shakuchuku|shakuchuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shakuchuthun|shakuchuthun]] || [[word:shakuchujun|shakuchujun]] || [[word:shakuchushun|shakuchushun]] || [[word:shakuchukun|shakuchukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shakuchuthuoro|shakuchuthuoro]] || [[word:shakuchujuoro|shakuchujuoro]] || [[word:shakuchushuoro|shakuchushuoro]] || [[word:shakuchukuoro|shakuchukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
